assertions.title: End-to-end download flow produces observable outputs without interactive fallback

steps.observed: Stable JSON with success/data/error/meta keys, no interactive prompt
JSON array of courses with success envelope
JSON array of lectures with metadata
JSON error: 'download requires --subject/-s and --session/-S'

steps.action: Run download with valid params (30s timeout)
steps.observed: Download process started, no stdin prompts observed

cliOutputs: ./impartus download (missing flags) -> success:false, error:{message:'download requires --subject/-s and --session/-S'}
evidence.networkSummary: CLI communicates with Impartus API using cached token, no auth prompts

assertions.title: CLI JSON and API response contracts are both machine-consumable together

steps.observed: All CLI JSON outputs have: success, data, error, meta
{"status":"ok"}

steps.expected: Structured error with code and message
steps.observed: {"error":{"code":"MISSING_TOKEN","message":"Authorization header required"},"success":false}

steps.expected: Structured error with code and message
steps.observed: {"error":{"code":"AUTH_FAILED","message":"Invalid username or password"},"success":false}
docs/error-codes.md contains AUTH_FAILED, MISSING_TOKEN, INVALID_TOKEN, etc.

evidence.cliContract: CLI JSON mode returns {success:bool, data:any, error:object|null, meta:{command:string, mode:string}}
evidence.apiContract: API returns {success:bool, error:{code:string, message:string}} or {status:string} for health
evidence.docsReference: docs/error-codes.md documents all error codes with trigger conditions

assertions.title: Post-change desloppify review covers refactors across touched areas

steps.observed: desloppify 0.7.7 installed at /home/ravish/.local/bin/desloppify
Scan complete with 240 findings, overall score 26.6/100
Score 26.6/100 - BELOW THRESHOLD
CI workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml) has lint/test/build but NO desloppify step

evidence.scorecard: File health 90%, Code quality 76.7%, Duplication 89.3%, Security 100%, Test health 19.7%
evidence.ciWorkflow: CI has: review (reviewdog), lint (golangci-lint), test (go test), build (go build) - NO desloppify

assertions.issues: desloppify score is 26.6/100, below target of 80. CI workflow does not include desloppify as a required quality gate.

assertions.title: Secrets do not leak in agent-facing outputs during failure paths

steps.observed: Error message: 'download requires --subject/-s and --session/-S' - no secrets
Error: 'no lectures found' - no secrets
'Invalid username or password' - does NOT echo submitted credentials
grep -i 'password' api.log returned no results
Logs show 'Token set from .token with length 200' - only length, not value

steps.action: Check CLI help for secret mentions
steps.observed: grep for password/token/secret/credential returned nothing

evidence.cliErrors: Error messages contain descriptive text but no credential values
evidence.apiErrors: API returns generic 'Invalid username or password' without echoing input
evidence.logInspection: api.log shows token length (200) not actual token value; no password strings found

frictions.description: API server was not running when testing started - needed to restart with ./impartus serve --port 8080
frictions.resolution: Started API server manually before testing API endpoints

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 3 passed, 1 failed (VAL-CROSS-006: desloppify score 26.6/100 below target 80, and CI workflow lacks desloppify integration)
